---
title: "🗓️ Agendas"
format:
  html
title-block-banner-color: "#ffffff"
listing:
  - id: agendas-listing
    type: table
    fields: [ID, module, title, file-modified]
    sort:
      - ID
    date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: [Module, Number, title]
---

## 🇭🇷 Featured: PAGE 2026 Workshop

- 📋 [PAGE 2026 — Day-of agenda + deck](R_Workshop.qmd)
- 📩 [Pre-workshop email + setup instructions](PAGE_2026_pre-workshop-email.md)
- 🧾 [2-page cheatsheet](PAGE_2026_cheatsheet.qmd) (`{ospsuite}` + `{esqlabsR}`)
- 🎓 [Certificate template](PAGE_2026_certificate_template.qmd) — batch via `PAGE_2026_certificate_batch.R`

## All agendas

::: {#agendas-listing}
:::
